Index.meta_title: VLOStats | Club Management Tools for Pickleball Leaders
Index.meta_description: Automated player leveling, dynamic leaderboards, and effortless event management for pickleball club administrators.

Hero.title: Run Your Pickleball Club Like a <important>Pro</important>
Hero.description: Stop guessing player levels, struggling with balanced matchups, and losing members to disorganized events. VLOStats gives club admins the tools to automate it all.

Features.section_title: Everything You Need to Run a Thriving Club
Features.section_description: VLOStats handles the complexity of player management so you can focus on growing your community.
Features.feature1_description: Every match updates player ratings automatically using our Elo-based algorithm. No more spreadsheets, no more guesswork — players are always ranked accurately based on real match results.
Features.feature2_description: Give your members a reason to keep showing up. Live leaderboards update after every session, driving friendly competition and keeping engagement high across your entire club.
Features.feature3_description: Generate balanced round-robin brackets in seconds based on real skill data. Group players by level automatically, fill courts efficiently, and run sessions that keep everyone challenged.

Pricing.section_description: Choose the plan that fits your club.
